---
name: Content Proposal
about: Suggest new content for the GenAI Engineering Hub
title: "[Content] "
labels: ["content", "enhancement"]
---

## What type of content?

- [ ] New model in the model map
- [ ] New architecture method (PE, attention, MoE, beyond-transformer)
- [ ] New serving/inference method
- [ ] New RAG / agent / fine-tuning pattern
- [ ] New AWS reference architecture
- [ ] New paper/resource to add to references/papers.md
- [ ] Other (please describe)

## Where should it go?

Which section of the docs/notebook should this live in?

- Section 1 — LLM Architecture
- Section 2 — Attention & Serving Kernels
- Section 3 — VLM & Multimodal
- Section 4 — Coding Models
- Section 5 — Fine-Tuning & PEFT
- Section 6 — Alignment & RLHF
- Section 7 — RAGOps
- Section 8 — AgentOps
- Section 9 — LLMOps & EvalOps
- Section 10 — AWS Production
- Section 11 — Security & Guardrails
- Section 12 — End-to-End Blueprint

## Maturity

- [ ] main (used in released model / major report / widely deployed)
- [ ] watchlist (emerging, niche, unconfirmed adoption)

## Sources

Paste the primary source(s) — arXiv, official report, blog post.

## Why it matters

In 2–3 sentences, why should this be in the hub? What does it teach or change?

## Will you provide a PR?

- [ ] Yes, I will open a PR with the content
- [ ] No, just suggesting

---

### Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues to avoid duplicates
- [ ] I have at least one authoritative source
- [ ] I considered whether it belongs in `main` or `watchlist`
